category_sources: source_facts.description says it parses and manipulates MP4/ISOBMFF files; official GitHub README describes MP4 parsing/writing and command-line tools.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name are mp4ff.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary project documentation and links a GoDoc/pkg.go.dev badge for API docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Eyevinn/mp4ff; per instruction repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: Official README describes MP4 media file parsing/writing, fragmented streaming files, and command-line tools.
